MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-15-2011 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-15-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin.; Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee ; Not Reported. (D514)

Appearances:
Plaintiff, SF HOUSING AUTHORITY is present. Represented by
Attorney, TONY RUCH, appearing for the plaintiff.
ATTORNEY PHILLIP R. MORGAN PRESENT REPRESENTING DEFT IN LIMITED SCOPE
Defendant, WANDA FOSTER, is present.

The Judge Pro Tem PAUL RENNE, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502A, for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

This case settled, the trial date of JUN. 20, 2011 is vacated.
